manager_checklist: Install same internal QA APK if not present (com.dincouture.erp debug 1.0.5/39)
Unlock device; confirm network to production Supabase
Login with Manager credentials (do not record password in evidence)
Open Reports Hub — verify Financial Statements section visible
Balance Sheet — open, load, no blank screen (any permitted company)
Profit & Loss — open, load, no blank screen
Ledger V2 — open, search a party, view statement
Account Ledger — open, select account, view entries
Verify Manager cannot access Admin-only settings (if applicable to role)
Create/view permitted operational screen (sales or inventory per role policy)
Confirm no unintended production mutations during QA
salesman_checklist: Install same internal QA APK if not present
Login with Salesman credentials (do not record password in evidence)
Confirm home/POS or sales entry loads
Open permitted reports (per salesman RBAC — may be subset of Admin)
Verify salesman cannot access admin company settings or GL journals
Complete a read-only navigation pass on assigned branch screens
Confirm no crash, no blank screen
Confirm no production mutations unless explicitly approved test sale
public_release_blocked_until: DIN BRIDAL monitoring drift understood or operator-approved golden refresh
Required role QA policy decided and Manager/Salesman QA completed if policy requires
